secciones.contenido: The Handyman service that will provide honest, professional, reliable, high quality services for your home or business.

imagenes.descripcion: Logo del negocio en la sección hero

secciones.contenido: Around the House Service is a licensed and insured local handyman service provider. We provide handyman services for both residential and commercial customers.

We are Honest,
We are Professional,
We are Reliable and;
We provide High Quality Service.

Painting and staining (interior, exterior and decks).
Installation tasks: TV wall mounts, ceiling fans, light fixtures
Furniture assembly.
Plumbing installations/replacements tasks: toilets, faucets, vanities, sinks
Garbage disposal installation/replacement
Drywall repairs,
Moisture barrier installation.
Pressure washing.
Mailbox replacement.
Deck building.

secciones.titulo: Hvac filters and smoke detector batteries maintenance package
secciones.contenido:
Ask about our Hvac filters and smoke detector batteries maintenance package.
Keep your home safe and efficient with our comprehensive maintenance service.
Total labor Cost $125 for the entire year. This includes two visits per year to change filters and batteries.
Schedule your service today!

imagenes.descripcion: Imagen de handyman junto a la sección de promoción del paquete de mantenimiento

secciones.contenido: To receive a quote, please fill in the form below and an AROUND THE HOUSE SERVICE representative will get back to you shortly. We look forward to working with you!
